Overall, the design is solid but the implementation is incomplete and has flaws that prevent full correctness and integration.

The code implements the required features but has critical flaws: the ThreadSafeStore uses a Queue for storage which is inefficient and incorrect for key-value mapping, causing lookups to be O(n) and risking data loss or inconsistency. Unit tests cover basic cases but do not test concurrency or collision resolution thoroughly. Overall, the solution is mostly complete but has correctness and integration issues that prevent reliable operation.
